channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NASCAR countersues 23XI and Front Row, as well as Michael Jordan's agent, in dispute over charters
item.description: NASCAR has filed a counterclaim against Michael Jordan-owned 23XI Racing and Front Row Motorsports alleging they “willfully” violated antitrust laws in connection with the most recent charter agreements.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: High school boys soccer rankings, March 5, 2025: Bay Area News Group top 10
item.description: Bay Area boys prep soccer: Bellarmine reigns atop rankings after advancing to NorCal semis, De La Salle also moves on to second day
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Suns' Kevin Durant, coach Mike Budenholzer share intense moment in comeback win over Clippers
item.description: Phoenix Suns star Kevin Durant and head coach Mike Budenholzer shared an intense moment during the team's comeback win over the Los Angeles Clippers on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Mets have spent more in Steve Cohen's 4 years than Marlins, Pirates and Rays over the past 21
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York Mets led the major leagues in spending for the third straight season in 2024 and have totaled $1.36 billion in payroll and luxury tax over four years under owner Steve Cohen, exceeding what the Marlins, Pirates and Rays each have spent on players in the past 21 seasons.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Emma Raducanu says she struggled to breathe after seeing 'fixated' man in the crowd
item.description: Emma Raducanu says she “couldn’t see the ball through tears” and struggled to breathe after spotting a man who was “fixated” on her during a match.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 7 stand trial over cyber death threats against Paris Olympics artistic director
item.description: Seven people are summoned to appear in court in Paris on Wednesday in connection with cyberbullying targeting the artistic director of last summer’s Paris Olympics’ opening and closing ceremonies.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Top NFL Draft prospect Travis Hunter’s stance on 2-way difficulty criticized by Shannon Sharpe, Chad Johnson
item.description: A pair of former NFL stars took aim at Travis Hunter's position that what he does as a two-way player was more challenging than what Shohei Ohtani does in baseball.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Hill broadcast to feature few commercial and more player-caddie chatter
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — The Arnold Palmer Invitational will have fewer commercials and more emphasis on data and player-caddie interactions as part of a pilot program a key sponsor has endorsed.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inside the numbers: LeBron James and his path to 50,000 points in the NBA, including playoffs
item.description: Another milestone awaits LeBron James: 50,000 NBA points. He's one point away from getting to that number, which takes into account his regular season and playoff scoring.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Florida Panthers acquire D Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks
item.description: The defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers acquired defenseman Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: USU gets smacked by Colorado State, 93-66
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - This is not the way the Utah State basketball team was hoping to go into the postseason. The Aggies suffered its worst loss of the season, losing by 27 points to Colorado State Saturday afternoon, 93-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utes beat BYU on half-court overtime buzzer-beater
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes women's basketball team ended the regular season with a bang. Matyson Wilke hit a half-court shot at the buzzer as the Utes avoided a major upset against BYU Saturday afternoon at the Huntsman Center, 76-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Father convicted in shooting of St. Louis youth football coach over son's playing time
item.description: Jurors have convicted a father in the shooting of a St. Louis youth football coach following an apparent dispute over his son's playing time.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies go cold in 82-65 loss at Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State saw a five-game winning streak over Boise State come to an end Wednesday night at ExtraMile Arena, falling to the Broncos in an 82-65 road battle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
